heading: Bulk purchases of vaccines for certain programs
label: 256c Bulk purchases of vaccines for certain programs
notes: Amendments1996—Subsec. (a)(2). substituted “with assistance provided under ” for “under the programs established in sections 254b, 254c, 256, and 256a of this title.”Pub. L. 104–299section 254b of this title
Effective Date of 1996 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , as amended, set out as a note under .Pub. L. 104–299section 5 of Pub. L. 104–299section 233 of this titleOct. 1, 1996
amendments: Amendments1996—Subsec. (a)(2). substituted “with assistance provided under ” for “under the programs established in sections 254b, 254c, 256, and 256a of this title.”Pub. L. 104–299section 254b of this title
Effective Date of 1996 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , as amended, set out as a note under .Pub. L. 104–299section 5 of Pub. L. 104–299section 233 of this titleOct. 1, 1996

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary, acting through the Director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention and in consultation with the Administrator of the Health Resources and Services Administration, shall enter into negotiations with manufacturers of vaccines for the purpose of establishing and maintaining agreements under which entities described in paragraph (2) may purchase vaccines from the manufacturers at the prices specified in the agreements.October 27, 1992

children.heading: Relevant entities
children.label: 2 Relevant entities
children.text: The entities referred to in paragraph (1) are entities that provide immunizations against vaccine-preventable diseases with assistance provided under .section 254b of this title

children.heading: Negotiation of prices
children.label: b Negotiation of prices
children.text: In carrying out subsection (a), the Secretary shall, to the extent practicable, ensure that the prices provided for in agreements under such subsection are comparable to the prices provided for in agreements negotiated by the Secretary on behalf of grantees under .section 247b(j)(1) of this title

children.heading: Authority of Secretary
children.label: c Authority of Secretary
children.text: In carrying out subsection (a), the Secretary, in the discretion of the Secretary, may enter into the agreements described in such subsection (and may decline to enter into such agreements), may modify such agreements, may extend such agreements, and may terminate such agreements.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: d Rule of construction
children.text: This section may not be construed as requiring any State to reduce or terminate the supply of vaccines provided by the State to any of the entities described in subsection (a)(2).
